data.biography:
Joseph William Gilgun (born 9 March 1984) is an English actor known for several roles, including that of Vinnie O'Neill in the Sky One series Brassic, Eli Dingle in the ITV soap opera Emmerdale, Jamie Armstrong in the long-running ITV soap opera Coronation Street, Woody in the film This Is England (2006) and its subsequent spin-off series, and Rudy Wade in E4's Misfits. From 2016 to 2019, he starred in the AMC television adaptation of the Vertigo comic Preacher as the Irish vampire Cassidy.

Gilgun was born in Chorley, Lancashire, to Judith and Andrew Gilgun. He grew up in Rivington, Lancashire, as part of a working-class family with his two younger sisters, Jennie Seddon and Rosie Thomson. Gilgun attended Rivington VA Primary School and Southlands High School. He has dyslexia and ADHD, which he describes as the "biggest pain of [his] life" and in interviews has openly discussed depression and anxiety. He started drama workshops at the age of eight, following advice from an educational psychologist, and was described as having "exceptional talent". He also trained at the Laine Johnson Theatre School and the Oldham Theatre Workshop. When he was 10, he got his first TV acting role in Coronation Street. He stayed with the show until he was thirteen years old.

Gilgun studied A-Levels at Runshaw College. Outside of odd jobs and a few roles in small theatre productions, Gilgun worked as a plasterer until returning to acting full-time with Emmerdale in 2006.
data.name: Joseph Gilgun

data.biography: Joseph Gilgun è nato il 9 marzo 1984 a Chorley, nel Lancashire, in Inghilterra. È un attore che è apparso per la prima volta in Coronation Street (1960) quando aveva solo dieci anni. Più tardi divenne noto attraverso Valle di luna (1972) e il film This Is England (2006).
Il est un acteur anglais né le 9 mars 1984. Il est connu principalement pour ses rôles de Woody dans le film This Is England, Rudy Wade dans la série Misfits et Cassidy dans la série Preacher
约瑟夫·威廉·吉尔根（Joseph William Gilgun，1984年3月9日-）是一位英国演员
data.name: 约瑟夫·吉尔根

data.biography: 約瑟夫·威廉·吉爾根（Joseph William Gilgun，1984 年 3 月 9 日-）是一位英國演員
data.name: 約瑟夫·吉爾根

data.biography:
Saahabzaade Irfan Ali Khan (January 7, 1967 - April 29, 2020) credited as Irrfan Khan or simply Irrfan, was an Indian film actor, known for his work predominantly in Hindi cinema, as well as his works in British films and Hollywood. In a film career spanning almost thirty years and featuring in more than fifty domestic films, Khan received numerous awards, including a National Film Award and Filmfare Awards in four categories. Film critics, contemporaries and other experts consider him to have been one of the finest actors in Indian cinema for his versatile and natural acting. In 2011, he was awarded the Padma Shri, India's fourth highest civilian honour for his contribution to the field of arts.

Globally, Khan worked in several international projects such as The Warrior (2001), The Namesake (2006), The Darjeeling Limited (2007), the Academy Award winning film Slumdog Millionaire (2008), New York, I Love You (2009), The Amazing Spider-Man (2012), Life of Pi (2012), Jurassic World (2015) and Inferno (2016).
data.name: Irrfan Khan

data.biography:
Sahabzade Irrfan Ali Khan (gelegentlich auch Irfan Khan; * 7. Januar 1967 in Tonk, Rajasthan; † 29. April 2020 in Mumbai, Maharashtra) war ein indischer Schauspieler.

Von 1984 bis 1987 absolvierte er eine Schauspielausbildung an der National School of Drama in Delhi. Anschließend zog er nach Mumbai, wo er zunächst in mehreren Fernsehserien und Theaterproduktionen mitwirkte.

Die indische Filmemacherin Mira Nair bot ihm 1988 einen Kurzauftritt in ihrem Film Salaam Bombay! an. Anschließend wirkte er regelmäßig in zumeist weniger erfolgreichen Filmproduktionen mit. Erst 2001 kam der große Durchbruch mit der Hauptrolle in The Warrior, einem in Europa produzierten, international erfolgreichen Historienfilm.

Seine erste Hauptrolle in einem Bollywoodfilm spielte Khan 2005 in Rog. Bereits 2004 gewann er als Nebendarsteller in dem Film Haasil den Filmfare Award für den besten Schauspieler in einer Schurkenrolle. Für seine Leistung in Metro: Die Liebe kommt nie zu spät (2007) erhielt er den Filmfare Award als bester Nebendarsteller.

Zu den europäischen und amerikanischen Produktionen, in denen Khan mitwirkte, zählen Namesake – Zwei Welten, eine Reise, Ein mutiger Weg, Darjeeling Limited, Slumdog Millionär, The Amazing Spider-Man, Life of Pi: Schiffbruch mit Tiger, Jurassic World und Inferno. 2017 wurde er in die Academy of Motion Picture Arts and Sciences (AMPAS) aufgenommen, die jährlich die Oscars vergibt.

Saahabzaade Irfan Ali Khan, acreditado como Irrfan Khan o simplemente Irrfan, fue un actor de cine indio, conocido por su trabajo predominantemente en el cine hindi, así como por sus trabajos en películas británicas y Hollywood. En una carrera cinematográfica que abarca casi treinta años y que ha aparecido en más de cincuenta películas nacionales, Khan recibió numerosos premios, incluidos un Premio Nacional de Cine y Premios Filmfare en cuatro categorías. Críticos de cine, contemporáneos y otros expertos lo consideran uno de los mejores actores del cine indio por su interpretación versátil y natural. En 2011, recibió el Padma Shri, el cuarto honor civil más alto de la India por su contribución al campo de las artes.

A nivel mundial, Khan trabajó en varios proyectos internacionales como The Warrior (2001), The Namesake (2006), The Darjeeling Limited (2007), la película ganadora del Oscar Slumdog Millionaire (2008), Nueva York, I Love You (2009), The Amazing Spider-Man (2012), Life of Pi (2012), Jurassic World (2015) e Inferno (2016).
E' stato un attore indiano.

萨哈布扎德·伊尔凡·阿里·汗（1967 年 1 月 7 日 - 2020 年 4 月 29 日）被称为伊尔凡·汗或简称伊尔凡，是一位印度电影演员，以其主要在印地语电影中的作品以及他在英国电影和好莱坞的作品而闻名。在近三十年的电影生涯中，可汗出演了五十多部国产电影，获得了无数奖项，包括国家电影奖和四个类别的电影奖。影评人、同时代人和其他专家认为他是印度电影界最优秀的演员之一，因为他多才多艺、自然的表演。2011年，他被授予莲花士勋章，这是印度第四高的平民荣誉，以表彰他在艺术领域的贡献。

在全球范围内，Khan参与了多个国际项目，如《勇士》（2001年）、《同名》（2006年）、《大吉岭有限公司》（2007年）、奥斯卡获奖电影《贫民窟的百万富翁》（2008年）、《纽约，我爱你》（2009年）、《超凡蜘蛛侠》（2012年）、《少年派的奇幻漂流》（2012年）、《侏罗纪世界》（2015年）和《地狱》（2016年）。
data.name: 伊尔凡·可汗

data.biography:
薩哈布紮德·伊爾凡·阿裏·汗（1967 年 1 月 7 日 - 2020 年 4 月 29 日）被稱為伊爾凡·汗或簡稱伊爾凡，是一位印度電影演員，以其主要在印地語電影中的作品以及他在英國電影和好萊塢的作品而聞名。在近三十年的電影生涯中，卡漢出演了五十多部國產電影，獲得了無數獎項，包括國家電影獎和四個類別的電影獎。影評人、同時代人和其他專家認為他是印度電影界最優秀的演員之一，因為他多才多藝、自然的表演。2011 年，他被授豫蓮花士勳章，這是印度第四高的平民榮譽，以表彰他在藝術領域的貢獻。

在全球範圍內，Khan 參與了多個國際項目，如《鋼鐵鬥士》（2001 年）、《同名》（2006 年）、《大吉利是有限公司》（2007 年）、奧斯卡獲獎電影《一百萬零一夜》（2008 年）、《紐約，我愛你》（2009 年）、《蜘蛛俠：驚世現新》（2012 年）、《少年 PI 的奇幻漂流》（2012 年）、《侏羅紀世界》（2015 年）和《達文西密碼 - 地獄解碼》（2016 年）。
data.name: 伊凡·卡漢

data.biography:
Regina Rene King (born January 15, 1971) is an American actress, director and producer. She has received various accolades, including an Academy Award, a Golden Globe Award, and four Primetime Emmy Awards. In 2019, Time magazine named her one of the 100 most influential people in the world.

King first gained attention for starring in the television sitcom 227 (1985–1990). Her subsequent roles included the film Friday (1995), the animated series The Boondocks (2005–2014), and the crime television series Southland (2009–2013). She received four Primetime Emmy Awards for her performances in the ABC anthology series American Crime (2015–2017), the Netflix miniseries Seven Seconds, and the HBO limited series Watchmen (2019). Her other television roles include the drama series The Leftovers (2015–2017) and the sitcom The Big Bang Theory (2013–2019).

She has also played supporting roles in the drama films Boyz n the Hood (1991), Poetic Justice (1993), How Stella Got Her Groove Back (1998), and Ray (2004), as well as in the comedies Down to Earth (2001), Legally Blonde 2: Red, White & Blonde (2003), A Cinderella Story (2004), and Miss Congeniality 2: Armed & Fabulous (2005). She earned critical acclaim, as well as the Academy Award for Best Supporting Actress, for her role in If Beale Street Could Talk (2018). She then starred in the western The Harder They Fall (2021) and played the title role in the biopic Shirley (2024).

King has directed episodes for several television shows, including Scandal in 2015 and 2016 and This Is Us in 2017. She has also directed the music video for the 2010 song "Finding My Way Back" by Jaheim. King's feature film directorial debut came with the drama One Night in Miami... (2020), which earned her a nomination for the Golden Globe Award for Best Director.

Description above from the Wikipedia article Regina King, licensed under CC-BY-SA, full list of contributors on Wikipedia.
data.name: Regina King

data.biography: Regina King (Los Angeles, 15 de janeiro de 1971) é uma atriz e diretora norte-americana. Ganhou dois Emmy do Primetime de Melhor Atriz Coadjuvante em Telefilme/Minissérie por American Crime. Em 2018, ganhou seu terceiro Emmy, dessa vez de Melhor Atriz em Minissérie/Telefilme por Seven Seconds. Em 2020, ganhou seu quarto Emmy, de Melhor Atriz em Minissérie/Telefilme por Watchmen, da HBO. Por sua atuação no filme If Beale Street Could Talk, recebeu aclamação da crítica e venceu diversos prémios, incluindo o Oscar, o Globo de Ouro, de Melhor Atriz Coadjuvante em 2019.
Regina Rene King（1971年1月15日-），美国女演员、导演。
data.name: 雷吉娜·金

data.biography: Regina Rene King（1971 年 1 月 15 日-），美國女演員、導演。
data.name: 雷吉娜·金

data.biography: Regina Rene King, née le 15 janvier 1971 à Los Angeles, est une actrice américaine reconnue pour sa grande polyvalence, sa longévité et ses performances acclamées au cinéma et à la télévision. Elle débute à l’écran adolescente dans la sitcom 227 (1985-1990) dans le rôle de Brenda Jenkins, qui lui ouvre la porte des petits rôles au cinéma dans des films comme Boyz n the Hood (1991), Poetic Justice (1993) ou Higher Learning. Au fil des années 1990 et 2000 elle apparaît dans des œuvres populaires comme Jerry Maguire (1996), How Stella Got Her Groove Back (1998), Ray (2004), ainsi que dans des comédies ou films familiaux tels que A Cinderella Story.  À la télévision, son rôle de détective Lydia Adams dans Southland (2009-2013) lui apporte une reconnaissance critique, avant qu’elle ne prenne part à des séries majeures comme American Crime (2015-2017) ou Watchmen (2019). En 2018, sa performance bouleversante dans If Beale Street Could Talk lui vaut l’Oscar de la meilleure actrice dans un second rôle, le Golden Globe, et de nombreuses autres distinctions.  Forte de son charme, de son intensité dramatique et de sa justesse dans des rôles très divers, elle est aujourd’hui considérée comme l’une des actrices les plus respectées de sa génération.
data.name: Regina King

data.biography:
Regina Rene King (New York, 15 gennaio 1971) è un'attrice, regista e produttrice statunitense. Ha ricevuto vari riconoscimenti, tra cui un Academy Award, un Golden Globe e quattro Primetime Emmy Awards. Nel 2019, la rivista Time l'ha nominata una delle 100 persone più influenti al mondo.

King ha attirato l'attenzione per la prima volta per aver recitato nella sitcom televisiva 227 (1985-1990). I suoi ruoli successivi includono il film Friday (1995), la serie animata The Boondocks (2005-2014) e la serie televisiva poliziesca Southland (2009-2013). Ha ricevuto quattro Primetime Emmy Awards per le sue interpretazioni nella serie antologica della ABC American Crime (2015-2017), nella miniserie Netflix Seven Seconds e nella serie limitata HBO Watchmen (2019). I suoi altri ruoli televisivi includono la serie drammatica The Leftovers (2015-2017) e la sitcom The Big Bang Theory (2013-2019).

Ha anche interpretato ruoli secondari nei film drammatici Boyz n the Hood (1991), Poetic Justice (1993), How Stella Got Her Groove Back (1998) e Ray (2004), così come nelle commedie Down to Earth (2001), Legally Blonde 2: Red, White & Blonde (2003), A Cinderella Story (2004) e Miss Congeniality 2: Armed & Fabulous (2005). Ha ottenuto il plauso della critica, oltre all'Oscar come migliore attrice non protagonista, per il suo ruolo in Se la strada potesse parlare (2018). Ha poi recitato nel western The Harder They Fall (2021) e ha interpretato il ruolo principale nel film biografico Shirley (2024).

King ha diretto episodi per diversi programmi televisivi, tra cui Scandal nel 2015 e nel 2016 e This Is Us nel 2017. Ha anche diretto il video musicale per la canzone del 2010 "Finding My Way Back" di Jaheim. Il debutto alla regia di un lungometraggio di King è arrivato con il dramma One Night in Miami ... (2020), che le è valso una nomination al Golden Globe come miglior regista.

Nick Dumont (professionally credited as Emma Dumont; born November 15, 1994) is an American actor, model, and dancer. They are best known for their roles as Melanie Segal in the ABC Family series Bunheads, as Emma Karn on the NBC series Aquarius and as Polaris on the FOX series The Gifted.

Description above from the Wikipedia article Emma Dumont, licensed under CC-BY-SA, full list of contributors on Wikipedia.
data.name: Emma Dumont

data.biography: Emma Dumont (nascida em 15 de novembro de 1994) é uma atriz, modelo e dançarina americana. Ela é mais conhecida por seus papéis como Melanie Segal na série Bunheads da ABC Family, como Emma Karn na série da NBC Aquarius e como Polaris na série da FOX The Gifted.

曾黎，中国内地女演员，中央戏剧学院表演系96级本科毕业，与章子怡、梅婷、袁泉、秦海璐、胡静、张彤、李敏并称中戏“八大金钗”，中戏毕业后进入全总文工团，先后在《烟雨红颜》、《东西奇遇结良缘》、《江山为重》、《男才女貌》、《归途如虹》、《死亡日记》、《理发师》、《神舟》等多部影视剧中出演重要角色。  2000年曾黎毕业后进入全总文工团；同年出演首部电视剧《本家兄弟》进入娱乐圈；2002年主演都市情感剧《男才女貌》受到关注  ；2005年主演爱情战争电影《理发师》并凭借该剧入围上海国际电影节最佳女演员奖。2007年主演悬疑情感剧《蓝色档案》 。2008年出演战争刑侦剧《军人荣誉》 。2010年出演民国侦探剧《唐琅探案》  。2012年参演家庭情感剧《妯娌的三国时代》；2014年参演电视剧《妻子不设防》  。同年出演青春励志剧《旋风十一人》  。2015年主演都市情感励志剧《真心想让你幸福》。2016年1月出演仙侠玄幻剧《青云志》 ；4月1日主演的青春校园励志剧《旋风十一人》首播 ；同年主演都市情感轻喜剧《主妇也要拼》  。2017年参演东方奇幻剧《醉玲珑》 。曾黎出生在湖北荆州一个普通的满族家庭，父母都是普通的职工。小时候的曾黎调皮好动，常参加体育、文艺活动。曾黎小学刚毕业，就考上了北京戏曲学院，主攻青衣。学艺7年后，她被分到湖北省京剧团工作，由于演出机会少，她不想就这样在这里虚度年华，在工作的第二年，她又以专业课第三名的成绩被中央戏剧学院破格录取，从此开始了演艺生涯。
data.name: 曾黎

data.biography: Zeng Li, an actress from mainland China, graduated from the Central Academy of Drama with a 96 class with undergraduate degree. He is also known as the "Eight Golden Hairpins" of Chinese Opera.
data.name: Zeng Li

data.biography: Tăng Lê (17/9/1976) là nữ diễn viên cùng thời với Chương Tử Di, Ngưu Thanh Phong, Lưu Diệp,... Cô là một trong số ít những diễn viên thích sự bình lặng không ganh đua cạnh tranh. Những tác phẩm có sự góp mặt của Tăng Lê: Nam Tài Nữ Mạo, Tân Liêu Trai Chí Dị, Bác Sĩ Nhi Khoa, Anh Em Một Nhà,...
data.name: Tăng Lê

data.biography:
曾黎，中國內地女演員，中央戲劇學院表演系 96 級本科畢業，與章子怡、梅婷、袁泉、秦海璐、胡靜、張彤、李敏並稱中戲“八大金釵”，中戲畢業後進入全總文工團，先後在《煙雨紅顏》、《東西奇遇結良緣》、《江山為重》、《男才女貌》、《歸途如虹》、《死亡日記》、《理髮師》、《神舟》等多部影視劇中出演重要角色。

2000 年曾黎畢業後進入全總文工團；同年出演首部電視劇《本家兄弟》進入娛樂圈；2002 年主演都市情感劇《男才女貌》受到關注 ；2005 年主演愛情戰爭電影《理髮師》並憑藉該劇入圍上海國際電影節最佳女演員獎。2007 年主演懸疑情感劇《藍色檔案》 。2008 年出演戰爭刑偵劇《軍人榮譽》 。2010 年出演民國偵探劇《唐琅探案》 。2012 年參演家庭情感劇《妯娌的三國時代》；2014 年參演電視劇《妻子不設防》 。同年出演青春勵志劇《旋風十一人》 。2015 年主演都市情感勵志劇《真心想讓你幸福》。2016 年 1 月出演仙俠玄幻劇《青雲志》 ；4 月 1 日主演的青春校園勵志劇《旋風十一人》首播 ；同年主演都市情感輕喜劇《主婦也要拼》 。2017 年參演東方奇幻劇《醉玲瓏》 。曾黎出生在湖北荊州一個普通的滿族家庭，父母都是普通的職工。小時候的曾黎調皮好動，常參加體育、文藝活動。曾黎小學剛畢業，就考上了北京戲曲學院，主攻青衣。學藝 7 年後，她被分到湖北省京劇團工作，由於演出機會少，她不想就這樣在這裏虛度年華，在工作的第二年，她又以專業課第三名的成績被中央戲劇學院破格錄取，從此開始了演藝生涯。
data.name: 曾黎
